events.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating an event was accepted for processing.
events.notes: Gateway-only diagnostic event; should not include full payload.

events.description: Gateway diagnostic event indicating a duplicate event was detected and deduplicated.
Gateway diagnostic event indicating event fanout to downstream services failed.
Gateway diagnostic event indicating event fanout to downstream services succeeded.
Captures when a user begins filling out a web form. High-risk due to potential PII capture.
events.notes: High-risk. Keep disabled unless you implement strict allowlists + safe-field policy.

events.description: Captures when a user submits a web form. High-risk due to potential PII capture.

events.notes: Stores host and selector hash only
Stores host and path hash only
Search query hash stored, raw query redacted

events.description: Records when a calendar event is locked to prevent automated changes.
Records A2P (Application-to-Person) messaging status transitions for UI updates.
events.notes: Status transitions for UI. Keep details minimal.

events.description: Records A2P compliance submission metadata without storing full KYC payload.
events.notes: Compliance submission metadata only. Do not store full KYC payload in events.

events.description: Records when an attachment is uploaded to a message. Attachment stored in R2 blob storage.
events.notes: Attachment bytes never in payload; use R2 blobRef only.

events.description: Records when a call recording is archived to R2 blob storage. High-risk, requires explicit opt-in.
events.notes: Recording stored in R2; event references blob r2Key. Enable only with explicit opt-in.

events.description: Records when a call recording becomes available for download. High-risk, requires explicit opt-in.
events.notes: Enable only if user opted into call recording. Store only IDs/metadata.

events.description: Records when a call transcript is created. High-risk, requires explicit recording consent.
events.notes: Enable only with explicit recording + participant notice; store structured summary by default.

events.description: Records when a reaction is added to a message. Good sentiment signal without exposing content.
events.notes: Emoji reactions. Good sentiment signal without message content.

events.description: Records message status transitions (delivered, read, failed) for UX updates.
events.notes: Delivered/read/failed transitions; useful for UX but low brain value.

events.description: Records when the default outbound phone number is changed.
Records when a phone number is purchased. Stores last4 digits only.
Records when a user joins or rehydrates an existing conversation thread.
Records typing indicator events for real-time messaging UX.
events.notes: Optional analytics. Consider sampling to reduce noise.
User consent preference changes - always allowed

events.description: Records when a user accepts a new version of the consent agreement.
Records when a query is submitted to the dashboard. Stores query hash by default.
events.notes: Store queryHash by default; raw query only under explicit scope.
Email content indexing - requires explicit consent
Receipt image and extracted data - high PII risk

events.description: Records swipe gesture events for UX analytics.
Records tap gesture events for UX analytics.
Records when a text input session starts. Stores counts and timings, not raw text.
events.notes: Use for in-app typing analytics only (counts/timings), not raw text by default.

events.description: Records text input statistics like character count, backspaces, and typing speed.
events.notes: Allowed fields: charCount, backspaceCount, wpmEstimate, pauseDurations.

events.description: Records when a food product barcode is scanned for nutritional lookup.
Records when macronutrients are estimated from a food photo or description.
Records when a meal is logged with nutritional information.
Records when a food photo is captured for macro estimation. Image stored in blob storage.
Records when a user rates their sleep quality after waking.
Records when a sleep session ends with duration and quality metrics.
Records when a sleep session starts for sleep tracking.
Records when a social message is sent. Content kept private by default.
events.notes: If this is a social-networking app, keep content private by default; allowSocial=false unless explicitly opted in.

events.description: Records when a reaction is added to social content.
Records when the app is moved to the background.
Records when the app is opened. Minimal lifecycle signal.
Records background location updates. High-risk, disabled by default.
events.notes: Background location is high-risk; keep disabled by default.

events.description: Records precise background location updates. Highest-risk, disabled by default.
events.notes: Background + precise is highest-risk; keep disabled by default.

events.description: Records foreground location updates. Coarse location (geohash/city) by default.
events.notes: Coarse by default (geohash/city). Only include lat/lon if precise scope enabled.

events.description: Records precise foreground location updates. High-risk, disabled by default.
events.notes: Precise location is high-risk; keep disabled unless explicitly enabled.

events.description: Records user-initiated location check-ins. Higher trust, less frequent.
events.notes: User-initiated check-in; can be higher trust and less frequent.

events.description: Records when the user changes location permission settings.
events.notes: Record when user changes location permission for transparency.

events.description: Records significant location changes using iOS-style significant change monitoring.
events.notes: Use iOS 'significant location change' style events when opted in.

events.description: Records when an event upload fails for diagnostic purposes.
Records when an event upload batch starts.
Records when an event upload batch succeeds.
Records when a workout set is logged with reps, weight, and exercise details.
Records when a workout session ends with duration and exercise summary.
Records when a workout session starts.
